message:
feat(ux): Add premium mobile UX enhancements with haptics and native feel

- Create haptics utility with native-feeling tactile feedback patterns
- Add mobile-ux.css with enhanced scroll physics and touch interactions
- Create BottomSheet component for iOS/Android-style modal sheets
- Update ControlDeck with haptic feedback on all interactions
- Add skeleton loader enhancements
- Implement WCAG-compliant 44px touch targets
- Add bottom sheet handle with swipe-to-dismiss
- Include native momentum scrolling with overscroll behavior
- Export mobile components from index

Following Stripe/Apple/Material Design patterns for world-class mobile UX.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+/**
+ * Mobile Components
+ *
+ * Components optimized for mobile/touch devices with:
+ * - Native-feeling interactions
+ * - Haptic feedback
+ * - Bottom-up modal patterns
+ * - Touch-friendly sizing
+ */
+
+export { ControlDeck } from './ControlDeck';
+export { BottomSheet } from './BottomSheet';
